title: Armor&Ores
description:
Expanding Boundaries, more content, more opportunities

This is our first mod, please do not judge strictly.
body:
# Armor and Ores  
### Adds new ores, tools and unique mechanics to Minecraft!  

## 🔨 What has been added?  
The new ore is Tungsten!  
- Generated in the Upper World at an altitude from 0 to 63 (very rare).  
- You can create a block, a pickaxe and an axe from tungsten.  
- Stronger than diamond, but weaker than nezerite – an ideal intermediate material!  

✔️ New mechanics – Cooling of the ephrite rod!  
- Place an ephrite rod and a bucket of water in the workbench to get a non-ephrite stick (a key component for future crafting).  

## 🚀 Future plans  
- Adding 3D armor with a unique design.  
- New ores and tools.  
- The ability to configure generation through configs.  

## ⚙️ Technical Information  
- Minecraft version: 1.20.1 (Forge)  
- Autonomy: Does not require other mods.  
- Compatibility: Works in any world, no conflicts with other mods have been detected.  

📌 Important: The mod is under active development, stay tuned!  

---  

### 📌 Why is it worth a try?  
- Adds useful material between diamond and nezerite.  
- Introduces a new method of obtaining nezerite components through alchemy.  
- In the future, unique 3D armor and more content!  

---  

### How to install?  
1. Download Forge for 1.20.1.
2. Place the mod file in the **mods** folder.
3. Launch the game and you're done!  

---🔹 Suitable for:**  
- Single player game.  
- Survival with friends.  
- Mod packs (if you need intermediate ore between diamond and nezerite).  

--- Download and test!** Feedback and suggestions are welcome!
